source.title: A Role for the Locus Coeruleus in Hippocampal CA1 Place Cell Reorganization during Spatial Reward Learning

confidence_rationale: Causal optogenetic evidence that LC-CA1 input drives goal-zone overrepresentation by reorganizing the place ensemble (rate remapping near reward). Establishes that at least one neuromodulator system writes affect-stream-relevant information into the place map by remapping, not just by modulating firing.
failure_signatures: Goal-zone overrepresentation is not a passive consequence of running near reward — it is causally driven by LC neuromodulatory input.
If REE assumed reward signals reach the hippocampus only through dopaminergic VTA-CA1, this paper falsifies that exclusivity: noradrenaline via LC has its own write-channel.

mapping.source_claim_statement: LC-CA1 noradrenergic projections signal reward translocation, and optogenetic mimicry of LC-CA1 activity induces place-cell reorganization near reward; inhibition of LC-CA1 reduces reward-zone overrepresentation.
mapping.ree_translation: Reward-channel imprinting on the hippocampal map happens via a specific neuromodulatory write-pathway (LC noradrenaline) that triggers rate remapping toward goal-relevant locations. This is direct evidence that affect-stream tagging and place-cell reorganization are causally coupled, at least for the reward channel.
mapping.mapping_caveat: LC release is not affect-channel-specific in general — LC also fires for novelty, salience, surprise. So the mechanism may be 'LC writes whatever salient signal it carries' rather than a reward-specific channel. The reward-zone effect here is downstream of behaviour-confined LC firing.
mapping.source_context: Mouse, head-fixed virtual reality, two-photon Ca2+ imaging in dorsal CA1, Ca2+ imaging of LC-CA1 fibres, optogenetic stimulation/inhibition of LC-CA1 axons.

confidence_components.notes: Strong causal manipulation, direct fibre imaging in CA1. Mapping fidelity moderated because LC is a salience/arousal node — the signal carried may not be reward-specific. Transfer risk is low for the architectural point that neuromodulators write affect-relevant information into the place ensemble via reorganization.
